strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, talks, and craftsmanship practices
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling work aligns directly with the role
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin usage; Java exposure is older (robotic arms, mobile orchestration)
Cloud experience is mostly AWS; no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes-at-scale depth shown beyond GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate brings over a decade of polyglot full-stack work with strong testing discipline and recent, directly relevant AI-agent/MCP infrastructure experience at re:cinq. Core stack alignment on TypeScript, Node.js, and React is excellent, and craftsmanship signals (TDD, workshops, OSS) are strong. Gaps around Nest.js specifics and modern Kotlin/Java service work are real but learnable given the breadth shown.
